zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Tarver於1594年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾米費爾德時，她的父親Edward Wilson29歲，母親Alice Wilcock21歲。她和Francis Smith至少有1個兒子。她去世於1667年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tarver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Warwickshire): of uncertain origin but perhaps related to   Tolfree  .

variants.name: Tolfree
meanings: English (Hampshire; of Norman origin): from the early Middle English personal name T(h)orferth (Anglo-Scandinavian Thorferth) or T(h)orfrey (Old French Torfrei), which are the English and Norman forms of an Old Norse name composed of the name of the Scandinavian god of thunder, Thórr, + frøthr or frithr ‘peace’. The spelling of this name by folk etymology as Tol(l)free, as if from a phrase meaning ‘not obliged to pay tax’, is not an American development, but was already in evidence in 16th-century England.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Tarver was born in 1594, in Mirfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward Wilson, was 29 and her mother, Alice Wilcock, was 21. She had at least 1 son with Francis Smith. She died in 1667, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Tarverが1594年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで生まれた時，父Edward Wilsonは29歳，母Alice Wilcockは21歳であった。彼女はFrancis Smithとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1667年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーで73歳で死去した。

ko.Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Tarver(이)가 1594년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 미르필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Wilson(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Wilcock(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Francis Smith(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1667년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts: роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Tarver родилась в 1594 г. в местности мирфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward Wilson было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Wilcock, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Francis Smith. Она умерла в 1667 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет.
